//userAgent: Wikimedia User-Agent string. All requests to *.wikipedia.org, *.wikidata.org,
User-Agent header or they will be blocked (HTTP 403/429).
DO NOT edit this file directly — your changes will be overwritten on git pull.
Instead, copy this file to ~/.config/wikimedia-skills/config.json and edit there.
Or set the WIKIMEDIA_USER_AGENT environment variable (highest priority).
